candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related row and populated, but it excludes R&D by definition.

variables.notes: Best match is outside the candidate list: 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total' appears in the A-column preview and is the most semantically correct explicit SG&A line. I did not use 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses' because the PROF formula subtracts XRD separately; using the excluding-R&D row would risk understating SG&A net of R&D. The numeric difference between SG&A total and SG&A excluding R&D closely matches the separate R&D expense line, supporting this choice. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

Section header, not numeric.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense exists. It appears below EBIT in the supplemental section, so it is mapped to XRD only; XSGA uses the broader SG&A total that appears to include this amount.
